front: Explain the function of aminoacyl-tRNA synthetases in translation fidelity.
back: Aminoacyl-tRNA synthetases (aaRS) charge tRNAs with correct amino acids in a two-step reaction. Editing domains hydrolyze misacylated tRNAs. Errors occur at ~1:10,000 frequency. Mistranslation from aaRS mutations causes neurodegeneration.
